title: Better Mobs
description: A Resourcepack with better mob textures
body:
A Resourcepack with improved mob textures.

This texturepack adds some cool new textures. Most of the textures are just in a different color, but the look cool.

This packs adds
- A blue cow
- A black pig with white eyes
- A magenta Creeper
- A blue bee
- and some more new Mob textures.

However, some of the textures were effected by mojang changing the model from some mobs like the cow and are now misplaced.

Download if you want to have change.
